questionHtml:
Which statement is evidence for the endosymbiotic theory?

A. Chloroplasts contain 70S ribosomes.

B. Protein synthesis occurs in the cytoplasm.

C. Organic molecules can be synthesised abiotically.

D. RNA is self-replicating.

meta.title: Which statement is evidence for the endosymbiotic theory? A. Chloroplasts contain 70S ribosomes. B. Protein synthesis occurs in the cytoplasm. C. Organic molecules can be synthesis
breadcrumbLabels: A2.2.12. Origin of eukaryotic cells by endosymbiosis
